configuration: docs/flow/harnesses/cursor.json copied into an isolated workspace with one invocation-scoped Mcp(flow:<tool>) permission

tool-discovery.evidence: An isolated Cursor Agent profile approved only the project Flow server and `agent mcp list-tools flow` reported exactly four tools.

reproduce: CURSOR_API_KEY=<secret> FLOW_CURSOR_E2E=1 uv run pytest -q -vv -s tests/flow/test_cursor_conformance_e2e.py
limitations: Native tool discovery passed after adding explicit `${env:NAME}` forwarding for Flow's runtime settings. The installed Cursor Agent reports no models for the saved login, no CURSOR_API_KEY is configured, and a headless protocol capture fails with Authentication required. Workflow execution remains blocked until an API key with model access is supplied. No workflow success claim or native run ID is recorded.
